title: IICPConformanceBadge
description: S.14 §3 — Badge attestation record for an IICP conformance tier claim.

badge_id.description: UUID v4 — unique identifier for this badge instance.

tier.description: Conformance tier claimed by this badge (S.14 §2).

subject_did.description: DID of the entity claiming the badge (e.g. did:web:node.example.com).

subject_component.description: Which component of the subject is being attested.

suite_version.description: Semver of the conformance test suite used (S.10 / conformance-test-suite.md).

passed_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the test run that produced the passing results.

expires_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the badge expires (BADGE-03: 90 days after passed_at). Set by the issuer.

test_results_url.description: URL of the full S.14 §5 test results JSON. MUST remain accessible for 90 days (BADGE-06).

issuer_did.description: DID of the issuing authority. Genesis Seed: did:web:iicp.network. Self-attested: same as subject_did.

verification_mode.description: Whether the badge was independently verified by the Genesis Seed (BADGE-05).
